answerRecordedDescription: Review the feedback, then continue when you are ready.
comeBackHint: Come back {{when}} for your next reviews.
completionNextSteps: You can jump back to the dashboard or review your updated progress before starting another session.
correctAnswerFeedback: Correct. Your XP has been added for this question.
couldNotCompleteSession: Could not save the completed session. Please try again.
couldNotSubmitAnswer: Could not submit your answer. Please try again.
howSessionWorksDescription: Answer each question and see instant feedback. Your results feed the spaced-repetition scheduler so future reviews adapt automatically.
incorrectAnswerFeedback: Not quite. The selected option has been recorded as incorrect.
keepMomentumDescription: XP is awarded as you move through the set, so even short sessions still push progress forward.
writtenPromptDescription: Type your answer with the math keyboard, then submit. Any equivalent form is accepted.
noQuestionsAvailable: No questions available right now. Try again later.
noUpcomingReviewsDescription: Nothing is scheduled right now. Keep practicing to schedule more reviews.
practiceIntroDescription: Start an adaptive spaced-repetition session and we will pull the next questions from your learner queue without changing the rest of the site structure.
practiceFlowTip: Pick an answer with the number keys, then press Enter to continue. Correct answers push the next review further out.
reflectDescription: See right away whether each answer was correct. Spaced repetition uses the outcome to schedule the next review.
sessionCompleteDescription: Your practice session is finished. The results have been sent back into the review schedule so the next queue can stay aligned.
sessionDetailsDescription: Small, useful telemetry instead of a second oversized panel.
solveDescription: Choose one answer for each question to lock it in and reveal the result.
upcomingReviewsDescription: Here are the topics you'll be reviewing soon.
